flashcards.back: A mechanism allowing multiple users/processes to access the same file, managed by the OS through permissions and locks.
The user who created the file, responsible for setting permissions for themselves, their group, and others.
Read (r), Write (w), Execute (x) privileges for Owner, Group, and Others (e.g., -rw-r--r--).
Extensions to basic permissions that allow fine-grained access control for specific users or groups.
Multiple writers modifying a file simultaneously can cause data corruption without synchronization mechanisms.
